leagueBriefing: The Devils dominated the Hudson River Rivalry, while the Hurricanes and Stars pulled off thrilling wins to tighten their grip on the playoff race.

games.headline: Devils dominate Rangers in physical Hudson River Rivalry clash
games.brief: New Jersey took control of the Garden early and never looked back, using a balanced attack to dismantle their cross-river rivals. The Devils' speed proved too much for a Rangers squad that struggled to find defensive consistency throughout the night.
bullets: Jack Hughes led the way with a three-point performance, including a highlight-reel breakaway goal.
The Devils' power play went 2-for-4, capitalizing on a frustrated Rangers penalty kill.
Rangers goaltender Igor Shesterkin was pulled in the third period after allowing the fifth goal.
The victory moves New Jersey within striking distance of a wild-card spot as the season winds down.
games.context: A crucial two points for the Devils as they push for a late-season playoff berth.

highlights.title: Devils vs. Rangers | NHL Highlights | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Hurricanes edge Penguins in high-scoring overtime thriller
games.brief: In a game that felt like a playoff preview, the Hurricanes and Penguins traded punches for 60 minutes before Carolina found the winner in the extra frame. Sebastian Aho's heroics capped off a wild night in Raleigh that saw lead changes in every period.
bullets: Sebastian Aho scored the game-winner just 90 seconds into overtime.
Sidney Crosby tallied two goals and an assist, continuing his late-season surge.
Carolina's top line combined for nine total points in the victory.
The Hurricanes have now won five straight games against Metropolitan Division opponents.
games.context: The Hurricanes maintain their slim lead for the top seed in the Metropolitan Division.

highlights.title: Penguins vs. Hurricanes | NHL Highlights | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Capitals suffocate Senators as Ovechkin nears scoring milestone
games.brief: Washington played a nearly perfect defensive game, limiting Ottawa to just 19 shots on goal. The Capitals' veteran core led the way, clinical in their execution and physical enough to keep the young Senators' stars on the perimeter for most of the night.
bullets: Alex Ovechkin scored his 30th goal of the season, moving closer to the all-time record.
Charlie Lindgren made 18 saves to earn his 25th win of the campaign.
The Capitals' penalty kill was a perfect 5-for-5 against a dangerous Ottawa unit.
Ottawa's lone goal came from Tim Stützle late in the third period.
games.context: The Capitals strengthen their hold on the second wild-card spot in the Eastern Conference.

highlights.title: Senators vs. Capitals | NHL Highlights | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Oettinger stands tall as Stars outlast Avalanche in shootout
games.brief: In a heavyweight battle between Western Conference giants, Dallas relied on Jake Oettinger’s brilliance to steal a win in Denver. Neither side gave an inch in a defensively disciplined game that required a shootout to separate the two rivals.
bullets: Jake Oettinger stopped 34 of 35 shots through regulation and overtime.
Jason Robertson scored the only goal in the shootout to secure the extra point.
The Avalanche outshot the Stars 12-4 in the third period but couldn't find the winner.
Nathan MacKinnon’s home point streak was finally snapped at 35 games.
games.context: Dallas moves into a tie with Colorado for the lead in the Central Division.

highlights.title: Stars vs. Avalanche | NHL Highlights | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Flames keep playoff hopes alive with shootout win over Blues
games.brief: A goaltending duel in Calgary saw Dustin Wolf and Jordan Binnington trade spectacular saves before the Flames finally broke through in the shootout. It wasn't pretty, but it was the kind of gritty win Calgary needed to stay relevant in the playoff hunt.
bullets: Dustin Wolf made 31 saves and stopped all three Blues shooters in the shootout.
Pavel Buchnevich scored the lone goal for St. Louis in the second period.
Calgary’s Nazem Kadri tied the game midway through the first and later scored in the shootout.
The Blues have now lost four of their last five games decided by one goal.
games.context: A critical win for Calgary to stay within four points of the final wild-card spot.

highlights.title: Blues vs. Flames | NHL Highlights | March 18, 2026

games.headline: Flyers survive late Ducks surge to win in overtime
games.brief: Philadelphia looked to have this one in the bag before a late Ducks rally forced overtime. However, the Flyers regrouped quickly in the extra session, finding the back of the net to escape Anaheim with two much-needed points for their playoff push.
bullets: Travis Konecny scored the overtime winner just 45 seconds into the period.
Matvei Michkov notched two assists, leading all Flyers in ice time among forwards.
The Ducks scored two goals in the final three minutes of regulation to force OT.
Philadelphia outshot Anaheim 38-22 across the entire contest.
games.context: The Flyers gain ground in a crowded Eastern Conference wild-card race.

highlights.title: Flyers vs. Ducks | NHL Highlights | March 18, 2026
